title: Eva Fan Mail
wikitext:
[]: Eva Fan Mail?             Quote Post by Djinnger » Tue Jan 03, 2012 11:03 pm Hello.....just trying to find out information about Evangelion. Specifically if we can send fan mail to the creators of Evangelion. I cannot find any information on it. I realize that it is quite possible any way to contact the creators was eliminated because of the previous death threats before the ending movie, but I am still trying. One, I am trying because I want to write to Hideaki Anno to tell him what a positive influence evangelion has been on my life; two, to tell him how awesome it is/he is; and three to thank him for this amazing series. I would love to be able to do that, so that he has some positive feedback for once. If I can't, oh well. It is not the end of the world, but I would love it if anyone could help me out.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Tue Jan 03, 2012 11:55 pm You can try to visit the Khara website, but you may also have to correspond in Japanese instead. http://khara.co.jp/

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Jan 05, 2012 4:02 pm It's not too late to be in FINAL. Write more death threats saying 2.0 sucked.

Specifically if we can send fan mail to the creators of Evangelion. I cannot find any information on it. I realize that it is quite possible any way to contact the creators was eliminated because of the previous death threats before the ending movie, but I am still trying. One, I am trying because I want to write to Hideaki Anno to tell him what a positive influence evangelion has been on my life; two, to tell him how awesome it is/he is; and three to thank him for this amazing series. I would love to be able to do that, so that he has some positive feedback for once. If I can't, oh well. It is not the end of the world, but I would love it if anyone could help me out.
